data.entity_name: Hong Kong University Data Science Team (HKUDS)
data.content:
Hong Kong University Data Science Team (HKUDS)
Hong Kong University Data Science Team is the development team responsible for creating the LightRAG framework.

Knowledge Graph
A knowledge graph is a structured method used within LightRAG to enhance retrieval, as opposed to relying solely on vector retrieval.

LightRAG
LightRAG is a graph-based RAG framework developed by the Hong Kong University Data Science team, which uses knowledge graphs to enhance retrieval and supports multiple query modes.<SEP>LightRAG is a new method or approach for implementing Retrieval-Augmented Generation using explicit entity and relation modeling.

Vector Retrieval
Vector retrieval is a retrieval method that LightRAG augments by incorporating knowledge graph modeling.

Relationships
Relationships are explicit connections modeled within the LightRAG framework's knowledge graph to improve retrieval.

Entities
Entities are explicit components modeled within the LightRAG framework's knowledge graph to improve retrieval.

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
Retrieval-Augmented Generation is the overarching concept of enhancing text generation with retrieval mechanisms, which LightRAG implements using a graph-based approach.

Query Modes
Query modes are the various types of queries supported by the LightRAG framework's retrieval system.
